headline: SCOTUS: 1️⃣ Trump WIN 🏆 3️⃣ Epic Ls 😩💥
text:
SCOTUS 🏛️⚖️ served Trump 🍊👑 a mixed bag on the penultimate decision day 🗓️😱! One W 🏆 for the Don 👴🏻💼: the Court 6️⃣-3️⃣ dumped FDR’s 1935 precedent 🚫📜 giving presidents full power ✂️👑 to fire regulators at FTC and dozens of alphabet agencies! Chief Justice John Roberts 📜👴🏻 penned the majority: 'Subordinates exercising POTUS power must be removable by him or they ain’t accountable to the people!' Trump’s three appointees plus the other three conservatives lined up behind the Big Orange 🍊 like a MAGA conga line 🕺🏻🕺🏻🕺🏻! The three liberal justices dissented hard 💥😡! Trump fired off a Truth Social victory lap 🏆📱: '90 years of precedent GONE, presidential power SUPERCHARGED when we need it most!' 🚀💥

But the W came with three brutal Ls 😭💀! First, a 5-4 coalition of Roberts, Kavanaugh and the libs BLOCKED Trump’s attempt to axe Fed Governor Lisa Cook 💸👩‍⚖️ after mortgage fraud allegations! Roberts warned of 'calamities' if presidents could boss the Fed around like a personal piggy bank 🐷💥! Trump wanted lower rates but got rate-blocked 🚫📉!

Second, the Court said states CAN count late-arriving mail ballots postmarked on Election Day 🗳️✉️! Amy Coney Barrett ✍🏻👩‍⚖️ wrote the majority with Roberts and the libs, telling Trump to take his fraud fears to Congress instead of the bench! Trump raged 'detrimental to honest elections' and begged for his election-reform bill but Dems + a few GOP cucks are stalling it in the Senate 🛑🏛️!

Third and biggest burn: SCOTUS refused to touch the $5M E Jean Carroll defamation judgment 💸😤! Trump vowed to 'continue the fight against this weaponization and lawfare' but the Supremes said FINAL ANSWER 🚫🔁! Meanwhile the $83M damages case still looms like a bad sequel 🍿😩!

Bottom line: Trump got the power-up he wanted but the Court showed him the door when he tried to fire the Fed, rig mail ballots or dodge the Carroll verdict! SCOTUS giveth, SCOTUS taketh away 🏛️⚖️🔥!
